description_long: This is a modern, boxy chaise upholstered in a light blue fabric with a subtle diagonal texture. The seat is wide and deep, with a thick, flat cushion integrated into the base, and the backrest is tall, rectangular, and slightly reclined for comfort. Both armrests are broad, flat, and extend the full depth of the seat, providing ample support on either side. The chaise stands on four short, square wooden legs with a dark finish, slightly visible beneath the upholstery. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible decorative elements or tufting. The upholstery appears tightly fitted, giving the chaise a sleek and contemporary appearance suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or public seating areas.
description: A modern, boxy light blue chaise with broad armrests, a tall rectangular backrest, and short dark wooden legs. The upholstery is smooth and subtly textured, giving it a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, tall rectangular backrest, and both broad armrests clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushion, and the slight recline of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain, unadorned backrest and the back of the armrests, with legs partially visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest, seat depth, and the backrest's angle.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, flat, and rectangular with no visible curvature or segmentation, and it lacks any decorative elements such as tufting or buttons. It is slightly reclined and fully upholstered in the same light blue fabric as the rest of the chaise.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, which are broad, flat, and extend the full depth of the seat.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, square, and made of dark-finished wood, with a simple, straight design and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid light blue fabric with a subtle diagonal texture, giving it a slightly patterned but overall uniform appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick, integrated seat cushion and a single tall backrest cushion, both attached and forming a continuous surface with the frame. No loose or additional cushions are visible.
